appliedItems.title: sugar density is a major category problem
appliedItems.explanation: Fruit is supposed to moderate sugar with fibre and payoff, and dates push the sugar side extremely hard.

appliedItems.title: glycemic behaviour is rough for fruit
appliedItems.explanation: Much weaker fit than fruits with gentler carb behaviour.

appliedItems.title: dried-fruit concentration makes the sugar hit even harsher
appliedItems.explanation: This is the cleanest reason dates should remain below ordinary whole fruits like grapes.

summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.

explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 18 from a base nutrition score of 27. Context dragged it down by 9 points.

topPros.title: still brings some useful minerals
topPros.explanation: Not nutritionally empty despite the weak fruit fit.

topPros.title: can be useful in high-energy contexts
topPros.explanation: There are niche cases where the dense sugar load is useful.

topPros.title: still a recognisable whole fruit
topPros.explanation: That matters for fairness even when the category fit is weak.
